issues.description: Tight coupling to ReactNoopUpdateQueue implementation. The Component class directly depends on ReactNoopUpdateQueue as the default updater, making it harder to test and maintain.
issues.suggested_fix: Consider injecting the default updater via a factory or configuration rather than hardcoding the dependency.

issues.description: ComponentDummy pattern used to avoid prototype chain issues. This is an older JavaScript pattern that can be confusing and is less maintainable than modern class syntax.
issues.suggested_fix: Refactor to use ES6 class syntax for PureComponent extending Component, which would be cleaner and more maintainable.

issues.description: Deprecated APIs (isMounted, replaceState) are mixed with production code. While they have proper warnings, keeping deprecated code in the same file as core classes can increase maintenance burden.
issues.suggested_fix: Consider moving deprecated APIs to a separate compatibility layer or file to improve code organization and maintainability.

issues.description: The error message in setState has a typo: 'Recieved' should be 'Received'. This is a minor quality issue but affects professionalism.
issues.suggested_fix: Correct the typo in the error message to 'Received type'.

issues.description: The file imports from 'shared/assign' instead of using Object.assign directly. This adds an unnecessary abstraction layer and could be simplified.
issues.suggested_fix: Replace 'shared/assign' import with direct use of Object.assign, which is standard in modern JavaScript environments.
